calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Ramanlal Patel is present and in Pro Per. Represented by Kriss Miranda
Defendant David Lapkin is present.
Attorney Karen Hu representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of DEC-27-2011 is vacated.
